original text:
Total Population 1911 to 1961: Population grew from 10,024 in 1911 to 19,155 in 1961.
Age Structure, in 5-year bands, from 1911 to 1961: In 1911, only 5.19 per cent of the population were aged 65 and over, but by 1961 12.77 per cent were.
Infant Mortality Rate 1911 to 1973: The highest rate recorded was 140. infant deaths per thousand live births in 1911, and the lowest was 8.98 in 1965.
